|timeline=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]<ref name="Post-ESB">With the exception of certain flashback issues, [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'' (1977)]] tells a continuous storyline, with issues 39-44 adapting the events of {{Film|V}}, and ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates both ''The Empire Strikes Back'' and the events of issues 52, 61 and 69 to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], thus placing all of issues 39-69 in 3 ABY as well. Additionally, ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' places the ''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'' storyline immediately before [[Star Wars (1977) 72|issue 72]], and ''The New Essential Chronology'' dates ''Shadows of the Empire'' to 3.5 ABY.</ref>
|series=[[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'' (1977)]]

{{Quote|Come back here, you impetuous roller skate!|[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 58">[[Star Wars (1977) 58|''Star Wars'' (1977) 58]]</ref>}}
'''''Star Wars 58: Sundown!''''' is the fifty-eighth issue in the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series of comics.

==Plot summary==
[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] blast off of the planet [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]] in the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. They enter [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] en route to meet a seedy merchant named [[Orion Ferret]] at a space station known as [[Bazarre]].

Meanwhile, [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] rejoins the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] fleet stationed above Arbra. She embarks upon a bold maneuver with which to conceal the fleet's location from the prying eyes of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] scouts. Using a device known as a [[Kerts-Bhrg field generator|Kerts-Bhrg generator]], the Rebels construct a large, pyramid-shaped force field that envelops the entire fleet. They move the ships within the corona of [[Arbran|Arbra's sun]], secure in the notion that the field generator will protect them from the deadly ultraviolet rays.

Princess Leia boards a shuttle craft to return to the planet's surface. Moments later, she discovers that the Kerts-Bhrg generators have malfunctioned. An absorption circuit within the cone of the control generator overloads flooding the maintenance bay with noxious fumes. All of the service personnel pass out from the chemicals. The only ones unaffected are the [[Droid/Legends|droids]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]. In order to save the fleet, the droids space-walk between the control generator and one of the star cruisers. They run a conduit cable into the Kerts-Bhrg generator and stabilize the fluctuating power levels. After the near-disaster, C-3PO contacts Princess Leia and provides an update on the crisis.

Meanwhile, the ''Millennium Falcon'' emerges from [[Lightspeed/Legends|lightspeed]] and arrives at the space station known as Bazarre.

==Continuity==
First appearances of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] personnel: [[Falltower]], [[Hilly]], [[Kavel Mesa|Mesa]], and [[Shahn]].

The subplot involving [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando's]] mission to [[Bazarre]] continues in [[Star Wars (1977) 59|issue #59]].

[[Arbra/Legends|Arbra's]] sun, [[Arbran]], is not specified by name in this issue. It is referred to only as "Arbra's sun."
